name: Bartender App Purchase Flow
goal: Complete the purchase flow: from the app landing page through pricing, sign up, and reaching the payment/checkout page. Stop before submitting payment.

steps.label: App Landing Page
steps.description: This is the Bartender app landing page on Setapp showing the app details, 98% rating, and two purchase options: 'Try free with Setapp' subscription and 'Buy now' for $9.99/year.
steps.title: Bartender — Download Mac app on Setapp | Organize menu bar | Setapp

next_action.description: Clicking the 'Buy now' button to proceed with purchasing this app directly for $9.99/year

steps.label: Plan Selection Page
steps.description: A subscription plan setup page for Bartender app showing a yearly subscription option at $9.99/year for 3 Macs with a Continue button.
steps.title: MacPaw Pay

next_action.description: Click the Continue button to proceed to the account/payment step
